mapper.select: select g_idx, g_writer, g_subject, g_email, g_content, g_regdate, g_active, f_name from guestbook where g_active = 0
mapper.insert: insert into guestbook(g_writer, g_subject, g_content, g_email, g_pwd, g_regdate) values(#{g_writer}, #{g_subject}, #{g_content}, #{g_email}, #{g_pwd}, now())
